revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Union of Burma]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Post-independence Burma (1948–1962) | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma (1948–1974).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Burma (1952-1974).svg | link alias-military=Tatmadaw | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-naval = Burmese Navy | link alias-air force = Burmese Air Force | flag alias-air force = Air Force Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-army = Burmese Army | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-navy = Burmese Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = State of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, Union </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Union_of_Burma here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Union_of_Burma for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Post-independence Burma (1948–1962) | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma (1948–1974).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Burma (1952-1974).svg | link alias-military=Tatmadaw | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-naval = Burmese Navy | link alias-air force = Burmese Air Force | flag alias-air force = Air Force Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-army = Burmese Army | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Burma (1948-1974).svg | link alias-navy = Burmese Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = State of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, Union </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
